pageHeader.title: Speaking
pageHeader.subtitle: Keynotes, Lectures & Workshops
pageHeader.description: Varun Gupta is available for speaking engagements at academic conferences, corporate events, cultural institutions, and educational forums.

topics.title: The Mahabharata and Modern Leadership
topics.description: Exploring leadership lessons from the epic — decision-making under pressure, ethical dilemmas, and strategic wisdom from the Kurukshetra war.

topics.title: Dharma in the 21st Century
topics.description: How the Mahabharata's concept of dharma provides a framework for navigating contemporary ethical challenges in business, politics, and personal life.

topics.title: Women of the Mahabharata: Voices Silenced and Heard
topics.description: A fresh scholarly perspective on the women characters of the epic — Draupadi, Kunti, Gandhari, and others — and their relevance to gender discourse today.

topics.title: The Mahabharata: History, Myth, or Both?
topics.description: Examining the evidence for the historicity of the Mahabharata through archaeological, literary, and geographical lenses.

topics.title: Reading the Mahabharata as Philosophy
topics.description: A guided exploration of the philosophical underpinnings of the epic, including the Bhagavad Gita's teachings on action, duty, and liberation.

seo.title: Speaking Engagements | Varun Gupta
seo.description: Book Varun Gupta for speaking engagements on the Mahabharata — keynotes, lectures, and workshops on leadership, ethics, philosophy, and ancient Indian wisdom.
